title: MCrBackrooms+
description:
It's possible to escape from Backrooms, isn't it?
(Made with MCreator)
body:
# How would look Backrooms in minecraft?
Well this mod won't show you :) but it may give you a little fun :D

What will you see in this mod?
- Backrooms Level 0 in my style (Like holes in floor isn't bug)
- Some structures
- Unknown Entity/Howler/Bacteria... Or how you call it...
- New sanity mechanics
- Some new items like Almond Water
- and more...

What from backrooms wiki won't you see in this mod?
- other entities than bacteria (for now)
- other level than level 0 (for now)
- other items than Almond Water

I hope you will like it :)

Credits:
- I used some help in MCreator's Froum
- I used help from **_Some Redstone Guy_**'s video, about simpe backrooms generation (to make it work I had to change code to fix some errors and things that will make backrooms not generate)

Q&A

Q: Is the mod available on Fabric or other Loaders?
A: No, but maybe in future I will add some more?*1 :p

Q: Is it safe to use this mod after updates of mod?
A: I would say it's the same like other mods, after updates you can use old world but ofcourse you may find bugs like some items got changed ID so you can lose it.

Q: What is that green ball thing that I see after creating new world?
A: It's as I name it "Sanity Bar" it shows you how much sanity you have (you can have from 0 to 10 points), but you will lose sanity only when you're in backrooms*2 so don't think too much about it after creating new world.

```
*1 Isn't here already fabric version? Yes there is, but it's experimental 0.0.1 so there is no sanity, almond water and some more things that forge version has!
*2 Only in version 0.0.8+. In 0.0.7 you lose it after you enter to backrooms for first time even if you're not in backrooms.
```
